translations.### 小米智慧家居新添購\n\n: ### New Additions to Xiaomi Smart Home
translations.### 新添購 — 米家藍牙溫濕度計\n\n: ### New Purchase — Xiaomi Bluetooth Temperature and Humidity Sensor
translations.#### 另外補充溫濕度計會不一直發推播通知\n\n: #### Additionally, the temperature and humidity meter does not constantly send push notifications
translations.#### 首先電風扇的基本功能方面\n\n: #### First, the basic functions of the fan
translations.**不確定是否是只有溫濕度計能這樣*\n\n: **Not sure if only the temperature and humidity sensor can do this**
translations.**當藍牙音響時** ，看影片會有1–2秒嚴重延遲；這算是蠻嚴重的缺陷，查大陸論: **When used as a Bluetooth speaker**, there is a serious 1–2 second delay when watching videos; this is quite a significant flaw. After checking forums in China, there is no solution, and the official stance is indifferent. It seems to be a hardware issue.
translations.1. **When used as a Bluetooth speaker**,:
1. **When used as a Bluetooth speaker**, there is a serious 1–2 second delay when watching videos; this is quite a significant flaw. After checking forums in China, there is no solution, and the official stance is indifferent. It seems to be a hardware issue.

2. No support for Spotify / Apple Music. Since I'm not a KKBOX user, after the free 3-month trial expires, I don’t want to pay, so I can only switch to using QQ Music in the China region.

3. Unlike the HomePod, which supports a home hub function, I originally expected to use the Xiaomi speaker as the smart home hub. Then, when I arrive home, the Mi Home system would detect the Xiaomi speaker and automatically execute corresponding actions (like the Apple HomePod + HomeKit setup); it seems this is not possible!

4. You need to install a separate Xiao Ai Speaker app.

5. Set the same region in the Mi Home app. I set my Mi Home app to Mainland China (because it has more features), so Xiao Ai can only be set to Mainland China as well.
translations.1. Can control all connected Mi Home sma:
1. Can control all connected Mi Home smart devices via voice commands

2. KKBOX membership free for 3 months in Taiwan region

3. Voice intelligence is powerful; compared to Siri, Siri is like a 3-year-old child  
   ¶Xiao Ai not only has basic voice assistant functions (checking weather, news, information, controlling appliances, playing music...)  
   ¶but also many extended skills (asking about TV shows, playing mini-games, chatting, telling comic dialogues, **acting as a maid, yes, speaking to you in a maid tone!!**)  
   ¶Supports customization (custom phrases and corresponding actions)

4. Another major difference is that it can infer and extend beyond the question. Unlike Siri, which only responds with the weather when asked, Xiao Ai will also ask if you want a reminder to bring an umbrella or something similar, making it more thoughtful and warm.

5. 360-degree audio input and output, with ample volume; voice commands are very responsive and accurate.

6. Can be used directly as a Bluetooth music speaker
translations.1. Mi Home Smart Camera PTZ Edition 1080:
1. Mi Home Smart Camera PTZ Edition 1080P (Supported: Mi Home)

2. [Mi Home Desk Lamp Pro (Supports: Apple HomeKit, Mi Home)](../c3150cdc85dd/)

3. [Mi Home LED Smart Desk Lamp (Supports: Mi Home)](../c3150cdc85dd/)

4. Xiaomi AI Speaker

5. Mi Home Bluetooth Temperature and Humidity Sensor

6. Xiaomi Body Composition Scale 2

7. Mi Home DC Inverter Fan

translations.[米家 LED 智慧檯燈 (支援：米家)](../c3150cdc85dd/)\: [Mi Home LED Smart Desk Lamp (Supports: Mi Home)](../c3150cdc85dd/)
translations.[米家檯燈 Pro (支援：Apple HomeKit、米家)](../c315: [Mi Home Desk Lamp Pro (Supports: Apple HomeKit, Mi Home)](../c3150cdc85dd/)
translations.ㄧ樣保持小米白色簡潔的設計，我個人不喜歡電扇太金屬(感覺就髒髒的)；小米電扇很輕: Keeping the same simple white design as other Xiaomi products, I personally don't like fans that look too metallic (they feel dirty). The Xiaomi fan is lightweight and clean-looking; even when not in use, it looks pleasant.
translations.一般來說是能連WiFi跟藍牙的設備都支援，但 **小米AI音箱居然不行** ！！: Generally, devices that support both WiFi and Bluetooth are compatible, but **Xiaomi AI Speaker surprisingly is not**!!
translations.不像 HomePod 支援家庭中樞功能，本來我預期的是可以把小米音箱當智慧家庭的: Unlike the HomePod, which supports a home hub function, I originally expected to use the Xiaomi speaker as the smart home hub. Then, when I arrive home, the Mi Home system would detect the Xiaomi speaker and automatically execute corresponding actions (like the Apple HomePod + HomeKit setup); it seems this is not possible!
translations.不支援 Spotify / Apple Music ，像我非 KKBOX 用戶，: No support for Spotify / Apple Music. Since I'm not a KKBOX user, after the free 3-month trial expires, I don’t want to pay, so I can only switch to using QQ Music in the China region.
translations.以上就是這次新添購項目心得整理，距離理想（溫度太高自動開冷氣、電風扇跟人、回家開: This concludes the summary of my latest purchases. There's still a long way to go to reach my ideal setup (auto AC when temperature is high, fan follows people, lights turn on when I arrive home, lights off and cameras on when I leave, dehumidifier activates when humidity is high), and the path is quite challenging... I’ll need to modify circuits, and I found out my dehumidifier lacks a return function, plus my AC is an older model. Many Mi Home devices aren’t available in Taiwan (e.g., universal remote). I initially wanted to build a smart home kit, but it doesn’t seem very practical now. For the time being, I’ll keep exploring what can be made smarter!
translations.僅支援藍牙連線，所以手機超過藍牙範圍後就無法讀取到數據；除非購買藍芽網關或是支援: Only supports Bluetooth connection, so the phone cannot read data once it is out of Bluetooth range; unless you purchase a Bluetooth gateway or other Mi Home devices that support Bluetooth gateway functionality.
translations.加入米家APP之後，可以從APP控制所有參數(模式、開關、風力、角度)；另外也可: After adding it to the Mi Home app, you can control all parameters (mode, power, wind speed, angle) from the app. You can also set scheduled timers (e.g., turn off at 7:00 AM from Monday to Friday) and link it with other Mi Home devices (e.g., automatically turn on when you arrive home, turn on automatically when the temperature exceeds 30°C). These smart home features offer plenty of possibilities.
translations.另外就是發現它能當藍芽網關，幫米家藍牙溫濕度計傳輸數據。\n\n: Additionally, I found that it can act as a Bluetooth gateway, helping to transmit data from the Mi Home Bluetooth temperature and humidity sensor.
translations.另外差別最大的是他比較會舉一反三，不像 Siri 你問他天氣他也就只回妳天氣就沒: Another major difference is that it can infer and extend beyond the question. Unlike Siri, which only responds with the weather when asked, Xiao Ai will also ask if you want a reminder to bring an umbrella or something similar, making it more thoughtful and warm.
translations.可以到「我的」-> 右上角「設定」-> 裝置通知 -> 找到米家藍芽溫濕度計 -: Go to "My" -> top right corner "Settings" -> Device Notifications -> find Mi Home Bluetooth Temperature and Humidity Sensor -> turn off
translations.可直接當藍芽音樂播放音箱\n: Can be used directly as a Bluetooth music speaker
translations.可語音控制米家所有串連的智慧設備\n: Can control all connected Mi Home smart devices via voice commands
translations.台灣地區送 KKBOX 會員 3 個月\n: KKBOX membership free for 3 months in Taiwan region
translations.官方文件的支援藍芽網關設備列表\n\n: Official Document Supported Bluetooth Gateway Device List
translations.左右擺角120度範圍很大，風力調節支援1–100段，風力大小隨心所欲；我最喜歡的: The left-right swing covers a wide range of 120 degrees, and the wind power can be adjusted in 1–100 levels, allowing you to control the wind strength as you like. My favorite feature is the "Natural Wind" mode. Since I get hot and like direct airflow, but often feel uncomfortable after a while, this natural wind mode lets me stay in direct airflow without discomfort!
translations.推播溫度太高或太潮濕的消息（但台灣這些溫濕度是很正常的…）\n\n: Push notifications for temperature being too high or humidity being too damp (though these temperature and humidity levels are normal in Taiwan…)
Following the previous article "[First Experience with Smart Home — Apple HomeKit & Xiaomi Mijia](../c3150cdc85dd/)" where I introduced how to use Xiaomi smart home products, I continued buying several Xiaomi home devices and tried to make all appliances smart... I can only say it's truly a rabbit hole. Initially, I just wanted to buy a stylish desk lamp from Xiaomi and ended up exploring smart features, which led me down this path!
translations.有任何問題及指教歡迎 [與我聯絡](https://www.zhgchg.li/: If you have any questions or feedback, feel free to [contact me](https://www.zhgchg.li/contact){:target="_blank"}.
translations.真的很詭異．．．小米AI音箱、檯燈、桌燈、攝影機都不支援藍芽網關功能，電風扇居然: It's really strange... Xiaomi AI Speaker, desk lamp, table lamp, and camera do not support Bluetooth gateway function, but the fan actually does!
translations.米家智慧攝影機雲台版 1080P (支援：米家)\n: Mi Home Smart Camera PTZ Edition 1080P (Supported: Mi Home)
translations.米家藍芽溫濕度感應器\n: Mi Home Bluetooth Temperature and Humidity Sensor
translations.綜合上述，日常使用下就只是個只能播音樂的藍牙音箱，偶爾叫小愛同學時間到叫我…就這: In summary, in daily use, it’s just a Bluetooth speaker that can only play music and occasionally reminds me when the time is up by calling Xiao Ai. Actually, Siri can do this too. Not being able to use it as a Bluetooth speaker for the computer is really a downside for me, but I have to admit its voice features are very smart and impressive! It’s worth buying just to try out.
translations.而且我發現一件神奇的事，就是 **米家直流變頻電風扇居然可以** ，WTF!!!: And I discovered something amazing: **the Xiaomi DC inverter fan actually can** do this, WTF!!!! So currently, I use the Xiaomi fan to send the temperature and humidity sensor data to the internet via WiFi.
translations.要另外再買一顆4號電池來裝；官方號稱續航可達一年，外觀圓形小巧、磁掛式設計隨時拿: You need to buy an additional AA battery; the official claim is that the battery life can last up to one year. It has a small, round shape with a magnetic mount design, making it easy to take off and handle anytime. The dual-row display screen allows you to quickly check the current temperature and humidity.
translations.要另外裝一個 小愛音箱 APP\n: You need to install a separate Xiao Ai Speaker app.
translations.語音智能強大；跟 Siri 比起來，Siri = 3歲小孩\n¶小愛同學除了有基:
Voice intelligence is powerful; compared to Siri, Siri is like a 3-year-old child  
¶Xiao Ai not only has basic voice assistant functions (checking weather, news, information, controlling appliances, playing music...)  
¶but also many extended skills (asking about TV shows, playing mini-games, chatting, telling comic dialogues, **acting as a maid, yes, speaking to you in a maid tone!!**)  
¶Supports customization (custom phrases and corresponding actions)
translations.跟米家APP要設同個地區，我米家APP設在大陸(因功能較多)，小愛同學也只能設大: Set the same region in the Mi Home app. I set my Mi Home app to Mainland China (because it has more features), so Xiao Ai can only be set to Mainland China as well.
translations.這次設備添購中最滿意的電器，NT$ 1995\n\n: The most satisfying appliance in this purchase, NT$ 1995
translations.關閉之後就不會再收到推播通知消息了！\n\n: Once turned off, you will no longer receive push notification messages!
translations.除了能APP記錄體重外多了秤物、平衡測試…功能，但就是體重計，比較常用的就是量體: In addition to recording weight in the app, it also offers functions like weighing objects and balance testing... but it's still primarily a scale, so the most common use is measuring body weight. The design is elegant, enhancing the home's aesthetic even when not in use!
translations.體重計也要另外下載一個小米健康的APP，在秤重時打開APP就能同步紀錄體重。\n: The body scale requires a separate Xiaomi Health app. Open the app while weighing to sync and record your weight.
